title: Devyr's Zombies
description: A mod that combines my various Zombies into one
body:
Custom Zombies in 1 pack

currently included:

Zombie Crawler
- Slower, weaker and smaller than a usual zombie
  
Zombie Boomer
- Very similair to a normal zombie, less health and explodes on death.
  
Zombie Hunter
- The zombie that climbs after you into trees and leaps at you like a spider.

currently this is a 3 into 1 mod of my other mods and i will only be updating this in the future and adding more zombies variants.

Feel Free to use in your modpacks with credits.
No reuploading anywhere.
